narrative: Strait of Hormuz tanker attacks drive a geopolitical risk premium, lifting WTI crude above $69 and supporting the USD/JPY carry trade at 161.93, where the 266bp OIS differential favors the dollar. Broad risk appetite remains mixed as chip stock valuations drag on European equities; gold consolidates lower -0.73% near $4,137, equities firm +0.72%, DXY consolidates +0.12%, and VIX holds at 15.8. Watch the RBNZ rate decision tomorrow at 02:00 UTC for the next major G10 policy catalyst.
